name: Ellis
description_short: Ellis is a British police procedural drama series (2024–), not a financial services company. The website URL points to an IMDb TV show page with no consumer finance services.
description_long:
Ellis is a British television series that premiered in 2024, created by Paul Logue and Sian Martin. The show is a police procedural drama centered on DCI Ellis and DS Harper, who are dispatched to various police stations across the UK to solve complex murder cases. This is entertainment content, not a financial services provider of any kind.

The series features Sharon D. Clarke as the titular DCI Ellis, a determined detective overlooked by her colleagues, and Andrew Gower as DS Chet Harper. Each episode presents a different murder investigation at a different police station, with recurring themes of institutional corruption, inefficiency, and Ellis's commitment to justice and compassion. The show has been compared favorably to established British detective dramas like Vera and Morse.

The IMDb page contains standard television metadata: episode guides, cast and crew information, user reviews, trailers, production details, and ratings (7.4/10 from 4.4K users). User reviews praise the strong character development and nuanced performances, though some note the writing could be stronger. This is purely entertainment media content.

This company profile request appears to result from a data error—the URL provided does not lead to a financial services company. Ellis is a fictional detective character in a TV drama, not a payday alternative lender, credit union, CDFI, or any other consumer finance service.
